title: drypis spinosa subsp. spinosa
intro: Drypis spinosa subsp. spinosa, also known as the spiny drypis or spine drypis, is a plant species in the family Tropaeolaceae. It has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating wounds. Herbal preparations of Drypis spinosa subsp. spinosa can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
